text: A “motor truck” or “motortruck” is a motor vehicle designed, used, or maintained primarily for the transportation of property.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 410

A “motor truck” or “motortruck” is a motor vehicle designed, used, or maintained primarily for the transportation of property.

*(Amended by Stats. 1993, Ch. 272, Sec. 11. Effective August 2, 1993.)*

subsections.text: A “motor truck” or “motortruck” is a motor vehicle designed, used, or maintained primarily for the transportation of property.
